title: A11y Ambiguity Guard: Skip Verify MISS for Empty {} Grap
desc: When BuildCompactWinGrap returns {} (WPF overlays, Eye window), PrintMultiWindowTargets skips AutoRegisterBug for verify MISS. hwnd: form works as fallback; {} is unfilterable so MISS is expected.
steps: Root cause: WPF overlay windows (AppBotEye, WhisperRing, ScreenSaver) have no proc/title/domain that BuildCompactWinGrap can use for a portable pattern, so it returns {}. FindWindows({}) behavior is undefined/matches-all, causing verify MISS false-positive.

Fix in AmbiguityGuard.cs: if hitCompact is '{}' or '{ }', skip the verify+heal path entirely. Use hwnd:0x... grap directly for these windows. The AutoRegisterBug suppression prevents noisy bug-auto suggests from Eye's own UI windows.

If auto-find verify MISS appears for a real application window (not Eye/WPF overlay), investigate BuildCompactWinGrap return value. The guard only suppresses reports for the exact '{}' and '{ }' patterns.
author: claude
